target.title: fix(kimi): switch to openai-completions endpoint for image support
target.body:
## Summary

- Route the bundled Kimi Coding provider through the official OpenAI-compatible `https://api.kimi.com/coding/v1` endpoint so image input reaches `/chat/completions` in the supported format.
- Preserve the existing Kimi coding User-Agent, stream wrapper, tool replay behavior, current `kimi-for-coding` model id, and legacy model aliases.
- Add a plugin-owned `openclaw doctor --fix` migration for persisted Kimi provider entries that still contain OpenClaw's previous exact Anthropic-compatible default. Custom endpoints remain untouched.
- Update Kimi provider docs and add a live image plus tool-result replay regression test.

Closes #75959. Supersedes the endpoint portion of #61379 and PR #62155.

## Behavior

Before this change, newly onboarded and persisted default Kimi configurations used `anthropic-messages` at `https://api.kimi.com/coding/`. Image requests could fail even though the catalog advertises image input.

After this change, defaults use `openai-completions` at `https://api.kimi.com/coding/v1`. The live regression sends a generated orange image, requires Kimi to identify it through a tool call, replays the tool result, and requires the exact terminal response `IMAGE_OK`.

## Compatibility

`openclaw doctor --fix` migrates only provider entries whose API and normalized base URL exactly match the previous OpenClaw default. It recognizes `kimi`, provider aliases, and case variants while preserving API keys, headers, model declarations, and unrelated fields. Explicit custom endpoints or already-current configurations are unchanged.

## Verification

- `pnpm test extensions/kimi-coding src/plugins/doctor-contract-registry.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/channel-legacy-config-migrate.test.ts` (9 files, 45 tests)
- `GOMAXPROCS=1 pnpm tsgo:extensions`
- `GOMAXPROCS=1 pnpm tsgo:extensions:test`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test`
- `pnpm build`
- `pnpm docs:check-mdx docs/concepts/model-providers.md docs/gateway/config-tools.md docs/providers/moonshot.md`
- `pnpm format:docs:check docs/concepts/model-providers.md docs/gateway/config-tools.md docs/providers/moonshot.md`
- Packaged `openclaw doctor --fix` proof migrated mixed-case `Kimi` and legacy `kimi-code` entries to `/coding/v1`, preserving headers and model declarations.
- Fresh autoreview of the complete branch against `origin/main`: no findings, patch correct, confidence 0.90.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Kimi Code Plan image input should use the official OpenAI-compatible chat-completions endpoint; existing OpenClaw-generated legacy provider defaults should migrate through doctor.

Real environment tested: Final-SHA repository live-test workflow plus a local request to the real Kimi Coding endpoint using the available Moonshot platform credential.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node .release-harness/scripts/test-live-shard.mjs native-live-extensions-a-k`; `OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 pnpm test:live -- extensions/kimi-coding/kimi-coding.live.test.ts`

Evidence after fix: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27457482655

Observed result after fix: Not yet established. The final-SHA workflow checked out `5244b56189` and passed, but skipped the Kimi test because no repository `KIMI_API_KEY` is configured. The available Moonshot platform key reached the Kimi Coding endpoint and returned HTTP 401, confirming that a distinct Kimi Code Plan credential is required. Merge remains blocked pending a real-key pass.

What was not tested: A successful Kimi Code Plan image, tool-call, replay, and final-response round trip; end-to-end delivery through a chat channel.
target.author: symonbaikov
